questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Planning Commission was established in 1950.
questions.reason: Reason (R): To achieve rapid industrialization and economic growth.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The Planning Commission was established in 1950 by the Government of India to achieve rapid industrialization and economic growth.

questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The New Economic Policy was introduced in 1991.
questions.reason: Reason (R): To liberalize the economy and attract foreign investment.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: Although the New Economic Policy was introduced in 1991, it was not the first liberalization policy. However, it is true that it was aimed at liberalizing the economy and attracting foreign investment.
